name: OpenThread Component
description: [Thread](https://www.threadgroup.org) is a low-power mesh networking standard for IoT devices. The low-power aspect is important for battery-powered smart home devices. However, it’s also low-bandwidth, making it ideal for applications that don’t send a lot of data, like switches or motion sensors.

config_entries.label: Network Key
config_entries.description:
**Required — set exactly one of:** `network_key`, `tlv`.

OpenThread network key.

config_entries.label: Tlv
config_entries.description:
**Required — set exactly one of:** `network_key`, `tlv`.

The Thread dataset as a hex-encoded TLV string, taken from the Thread information in Home Assistant. **Required** on nRF52840.

config_entries.label: Device Type
config_entries.description: OpenThread Device Type, either `FTD` or `MTD`. Defaults to `FTD`. On nRF52840 this selects the matching Nordic prebuilt OpenThread library.

config_entries.label: Ext Pan ID
config_entries.description: 8-byte Extended Personal Area Network ID (XPAN ID).

config_entries.label: Force Dataset
config_entries.description: Forces ESPHome to override any OpenThread network dataset previously stored on the device, ensuring the configured dataset is applied at startup. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Mesh Local Prefix
config_entries.description: Used to build Mesh-Local IPv6 addresses (ML-EIDs), which are unique to each Thread device within the network partition.

config_entries.label: Output Power
config_entries.description: The amount of TX power for the Thread 802.15.4 radio in dBm. Range depends on the chip variant: ESP32-C5/C6 from `-15dBm` to `20dBm`, ESP32-H2 from `-24dBm` to `20dBm`. Defaults to the platform default (typically `0dBm`). Ensure the configured value complies with local regulatory limits.

config_entries.label: Poll Period
config_entries.description: When set on an MTD device, the parent router enqueues any messages and waits for the child to submit a poll data request.

config_entries.label: Pskc
config_entries.description: PSKc is used to authenticate an external Thread Commissioner to a Thread network.

config_entries.label: Use Address
config_entries.description: Manually override the address used to connect to the device. Defaults to an auto-generated value.
